faqItems.question: How do I contact support?
faqItems.answer: Open the Help Center and click the support link.

faqItems.question: Where can I read the privacy policy?
faqItems.answer: Open Settings > Privacy Policy, or visit https://example.com/privacy.

faqItems.question: Does the help center work offline?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Bundled FAQ items remain available when the remote JSON cannot be loaded.
